title: creact --watch
description: Run CReact in watch mode. Automatically restarts when source files change.
behavior_run: Type checks and runs your entry file
behavior_restart: On file change: stops the current run (executes cleanups), re-type-checks, and restarts
behavior_state: State persists between restarts via the Memory interface
code_output:
$ creact --watch index.tsx

 ╭──────────────────────╮
 │    CReact v0.3.0     │
 ╰──────────────────────╯

 ✓ Type check passed (3 files, 120ms)
 ▶ App started
 ◎ Watching for changes...

 ⟳ File changed: src/app.tsx
 ⟳ Restarting...
 ✓ Type check passed (3 files, 95ms)
 ▶ App started
tip_state_persists: State persists across restarts. Edit your component tree without losing deployed state.
